favourites.title: Fourth Wing
favourites.author: Rebecca Yarros
favourites.description: A thrilling fantasy romance set in a brutal war college where dragon riders are forged in fire.

favourites.title: The Housemaid
favourites.author: Freida McFadden
favourites.description: A shocking psychological thriller about lies, deceit, and a house that holds deadly secrets.

favourites.title: Atomic Habits
favourites.author: James Clear
favourites.description: A practical guide to building good habits, breaking bad ones, and mastering the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

favourites.title: It Ends With Us
favourites.author: Colleen Hoover
favourites.description: A heart-wrenching tale of love, pain, and the courage to walk away from what hurts most.

favourites.title: The Night Circus
favourites.author: Erin Morgenstern
favourites.description: A magical competition between two young illusionists becomes a breathtaking love story.

favourites.title: The Alchemist
favourites.author: Paulo Coelho
favourites.description: A young shepherd sets out on a journey to discover his personal legend and the true treasures of life.

favourites.title: Verity
favourites.author: Colleen Hoover
favourites.description: A writer discovers chilling secrets while completing an unfinished manuscript for a famous author.

favourites.title: The Song of Achilles
favourites.author: Madeline Miller
favourites.description: A beautiful retelling of the Iliad through the eyes of Patroclus, Achilles’ closest companion.

favourites.title: Before We Were Strangers
favourites.author: Renée Carlino
favourites.description: A touching love story about rediscovery and second chances between two college sweethearts.

favourites.title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
favourites.author: Mark Manson
favourites.description: A brutally honest guide to living a good life by focusing on what truly matters.

trending.title: Iron Flame
trending.author: Rebecca Yarros
trending.description: The explosive sequel to Fourth Wing, where the stakes are higher, the dragons fiercer, and the love even more dangerous.

trending.title: A Court of Thorns and Roses
trending.author: Sarah J. Maas
trending.description: A spellbinding story of a mortal huntress who finds herself entangled in the deadly politics of the fae.

trending.title: The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo
trending.author: Taylor Jenkins Reid
trending.description: A reclusive Hollywood icon finally tells the truth about her glamorous and scandalous life.

trending.title: Lessons in Chemistry
trending.author: Bonnie Garmus
trending.description: A brilliant chemist in the 1960s becomes an unlikely TV cooking show host, challenging gender roles and expectations.

trending.title: Happy Place
trending.author: Emily Henry
trending.description: A witty and emotional story about a broken engagement, a fake relationship, and the rediscovery of love.

trending.title: The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes
trending.author: Suzanne Collins
trending.description: The prequel to The Hunger Games, exploring the dark origins of Panem and its future tyrant, President Snow.

trending.title: Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow
trending.author: Gabrielle Zevin
trending.description: A story of friendship, creativity, and love centered around two friends who build video games together.

trending.title: Book Lovers
trending.author: Emily Henry
trending.description: A clever enemies-to-lovers story about a literary agent and an editor who find themselves stuck in the same small town.

trending.title: Daisy Jones & The Six
trending.author: Taylor Jenkins Reid
trending.description: A vibrant oral history of a 1970s rock band that implodes at the height of fame.

trending.title: The Invisible Life of Addie LaRue
trending.author: V.E. Schwab
trending.description: A young woman makes a Faustian bargain to live forever, but is cursed to be forgotten by everyone she meets.
